reviews.review_description: I play this game and feel like im a toddler because of all the colors and saturation, its brain wowing and numming. I played from release until i pooded my pants with it streaming down my legs. I must add tho that Silver Monkey is still on top. I bought the mod menu and went small and ran up my friend brandoos rear. Monking Arounds owner is nice and he offered to tour me around to which i declined saying i didnt want to, then he called me to the basement of shop where i saw AllocaDev in a chair screaming about a soundcloud playlist called Mustard Mango 67 Skibidi Rizzy Slop Vol 1 when i listened my mom started dancing and sang along. I believe the lights on the trees look like dih cheese but thats ok maybe just some variation of colors. Go download Monkle for no reason and get One Monke. Anyways the game made me scared when i flew out the water at mach 1. Speaking of that speed, a fighter jet is one of the fastest machines ever built, capable of cutting through the sky at incredible speeds. Modern jets can fly faster than the speed of sound, reaching well over 1,500 miles per hour depending on the model. Their powerful engines and aerodynamic design allow them to accelerate quickly, maneuver sharply, and cover long distances in just minutes. I hoped you thoroughly read this review and enjoy your time.
Even though me and the staff have not spoken in a year almost I would just like too say that they are very good people go ahead and play the game
its very fun play tag with people and graphics are very good 5/5
water physics are good unlike most fangames
I love the plush in the ginger bread house
